creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
True. I have sysctl kern.coredump=0 so no core dumps, but log shows some issues noted below. Not sure if this is dependency or the application problem though. Probably would be good to see this application version on another platform to compare.. or similar application on FreeBSD?
